recap: Replaced full-word mode labels (NORMAL, INSERT, etc.) with single-letter equivalents (N, I, V, S, C) in getMode().
Added O.colors.statusline.worktreeBadge with bg=ORANGE_7, fg=ORANGE_1 under -- Special in ui.lua.
Extracted getContextBadge() from getFileData(); calls git-worktree-name and context-root; renders worktree badge with placeholder '>' arrows between project badge and filepath in main().
